typeSafety.evidence: Read 15+ source files. WebSocket onMessage still accepts untyped msg: any. validateState uses as unknown as StateData cast. validateProgress also uses cast without enforcing required fields. useQueueActions uses undefined as any. Header.tsx and App.tsx catch blocks use err: any without narrowing.

findings.finding: WebSocket onMessage callback accepts untyped msg: any - allows unsafe property access without runtime validation
findings.fix: Create discriminated union type for WebSocket messages and validate at boundary

findings.finding: validateState uses as unknown as StateData cast, bypassing type checking on required fields
findings.fix: Build result explicitly with proper typing instead of casting

findings.finding: validateProgress returns data as unknown as ProgressEntry without enforcing all required fields
findings.fix: Assert required fields are present before returning typed object

findings.finding: Uses undefined as any to suppress type error when resetting progress
findings.fix: Refactor setTaskProgress to accept undefined natively or use empty string

findings.finding: catch (err: any) in switchProject lacks error narrowing
findings.fix: Use instanceof Error check and String(err) fallback

findings.finding: catch (err: any) block in sync skills handler lacks error type narrowing
findings.fix: Use err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)

componentArchitecture.evidence: Read 38 component files. TaskBoard receives 14+ props with 3 levels of nesting. App.tsx mixes UI state (selectedTask, productTab) with business logic (project connection, undo). useProject returns 20+ properties. CommandQueue at 126 lines is well-scoped. TaskDetail manages 6 local states with manual reset key pattern.

findings.finding: TaskBoard receives 14+ props passed through 3 levels (App -> TaskBoard -> EpicGroup -> TaskCard) - excessive prop drilling
findings.fix: Create TaskBoardContext to provide task action handlers at tree root

findings.finding: App.tsx mixes UI state (selectedTask, productTab, splitting, glowTaskId) with business logic (project connection, undo)
findings.fix: Extract UI state into useTaskBoardUI() hook

findings.finding: useProject returns 20+ properties mixing connection, data, and discovery concerns
findings.fix: Split into useProjectConnection, useProjectData, useProjectDiscovery

findings.finding: TaskBoard at 356 lines handles filtering, epic colors, visibility toggling, and grouping
findings.fix: Extract useTaskFiltering and useEpicColors hooks

findings.finding: TaskDetail manages 6 local states with manual reset key pattern - prone to sync bugs
findings.fix: Replace manual reset with useReducer or custom hook

errorHandling.evidence: Read 15+ files. Critical writeState calls in useProject.ts (lines 203, 313, 333) have .then() but no .catch(). Fire-and-forget deleteProgressFile calls. handleLaunchPhase loop exits on first error leaving partial state. handleLaunchTask resets progress but gives minimal user feedback. Empty catch in useProcessOutput WebSocket.

findings.finding: writeState called with .then() but no .catch() - silent failure on progress merge write
findings.fix: Add .catch() handler with error status update and user notification

findings.finding: pauseTask and cancelTask call writeState.then() without .catch() - unhandled promise rejection
findings.fix: Add .catch() with error status and rollback

findings.finding: Fire-and-forget deleteProgressFile calls - failed deletion causes orphaned files and duplicate processing
findings.fix: Use Promise.allSettled with error logging

findings.finding: handleLaunchPhase loop exits on first error leaving remaining tasks showing 'Launching...' but never launched
findings.fix: Use Promise.allSettled to launch all tasks and report partial failures

findings.finding: Empty catch on api.listProjects() silently breaks multi-project UI
findings.fix: Log with context and provide fallback

findings.finding: getBufferedOutput catches all errors with empty handler - masks real failures
findings.fix: Distinguish between 404 (expected) and actual errors

findings.finding: Process exit writes progress only on failure. Success path leaves task in-progress
findings.fix: Always write progress on exit with appropriate status

findings.finding: WebSocket parse error silently drops malformed JSON
findings.fix: Log parse errors for debugging

testing.evidence: 353 tests failing (up from 320 - 16.8% failure rate worsening). 66 test files failing. Root causes: ProjectPicker tests reference removed props (lastProjectName, onReconnect). CommandQueue tests render text mismatches. useQueueActions tests crash on URL parsing. Worktree duplicates inflate failure count by ~100. Zero coverage for server files, detail/, quality/, board/ subcomponents.

findings.finding: Tests reference removed props (lastProjectName, onReconnect) - 40+ failures from interface mismatch
findings.fix: Update test props to match current ProjectPickerProps interface

findings.finding: Tests pass removed props and expect non-matching rendered text - 12+ failures
findings.fix: Update mock props and assertions to match current CommandQueue interface

findings.finding: Worktree test duplicates inflate failure count by ~100 false failures
findings.fix: Add .devmanager/worktrees/ and .claude/worktrees/ to vitest exclude config

findings.finding: handleLaunchTask tests crash with URL parse error - missing fetch mock for /api/launch
findings.fix: Add proper fetch mock or mock URL API for custom protocols

findings.finding: 4 tests fail on attachment operations - mock exports don't match fs.ts module
findings.fix: Update fs.ts mock to include saveAttachment and deleteAttachment

findings.finding: Zero test coverage for all server files (1600+ LOC including api.js, process.js, watcher.js)
findings.fix: Create integration tests for API endpoints and process management

findings.finding: No tests for detail/, quality/, board/ subcomponents (40+ components untested)
findings.fix: Add behavior tests for critical components starting with TaskCard, EpicGroup, Scorecard

findings.finding: Tests are implementation-focused checking internal state - break easily on refactoring
findings.fix: Refactor to behavior-based tests using @testing-library patterns

cssDesignSystem.evidence: Read variables.css, styles.css, components.css, and 6 component files. Well-structured token system with comprehensive dark mode. Hardcoded #fff and rgba values in components.css (lines 715, 724, 676). ~70% of layout/spacing uses inline styles with hardcoded 12px/16px/24px instead of tokens. Dark mode epic border opacity (0.3) may be too subtle. Form input background uses --dm-bg instead of --dm-surface in dark mode.

findings.finding: Autofix button uses hardcoded #fff instead of var(--dm-text-on-accent) token
findings.fix: Replace #fff with var(--dm-text-on-accent) on lines 715 and 724

findings.finding: Weight badge uses hardcoded rgba(196,122,122,0.12) instead of design token
findings.fix: Create --dm-danger-light token and use it

findings.finding: Form inputs use var(--dm-bg) in dark mode creating low contrast - should use var(--dm-surface)
findings.fix: Change .input-field and .textarea-field background to var(--dm-surface)

findings.finding: Dark mode epic border opacity 0.3 may be too subtle for visibility
findings.fix: Increase epic border opacity from 0.3 to 0.5 in dark mode

findings.finding: Grade circle uses inline background instead of CSS class
findings.fix: Add .grade-circle class to components.css

domainLogic.evidence: Read dependency sorting, phase computation, validation, state management. Circular dependencies silently handled by forcing remaining items into one phase. mergeProgressIntoState ignores non-existent task IDs. Activity log truncated to 20 without warning. No cycle detection when task dependencies change. Epic color assignment not stable across deletions.

findings.finding: Circular dependency forces all remaining items into one phase without warning - masks cycles and produces unexecutable phases
findings.fix: Detect and report circular dependencies before forcing resolution

findings.finding: Silent circular dependency handling - leaves cycled items unconsolidated without user warning
findings.fix: Return SortResult with hasCycles flag and cycleIds for UI display

findings.finding: mergeProgressIntoState silently ignores progress for non-existent task IDs creating orphaned activity entries
findings.fix: Validate task existence before merging progress

findings.finding: Activity log silently truncated to 20 items - permanent data loss with no metadata
findings.fix: Increase limit or return truncation metadata for UI indicator

findings.finding: No state machine validation for task status transitions - invalid transitions accepted silently
findings.fix: Add valid transition rules and warn on invalid transitions

findings.finding: needsWrite flag inconsistent between status changes and progress-only updates
findings.fix: Always persist on any status change

findings.finding: No cycle detection when task dependsOn field is updated - allows creating circular dependencies
findings.fix: Add detectCycles utility and validate before saving dependency changes

accessibility.evidence: Read 15 component files and variables.css. Danger color #c47a7a on surface #fefcf9 achieves only ~3.8:1 contrast (fails WCAG AA 4.5:1). Form inputs lack associated labels. No .sr-only utility class. Focus trap missing Escape key handler. Epic toggle buttons lack aria-labels. Loading skeletons lack aria-busy. Launch buttons use unicode symbols without text alternatives.

findings.finding: Danger color #c47a7a on surface #fefcf9 achieves only ~3.8:1 contrast - fails WCAG AA (4.5:1 required)
findings.fix: Darken --dm-danger to #b34545 for 5.2:1 contrast ratio

findings.finding: Form inputs lack associated <label> elements - uses placeholder text only
findings.fix: Add htmlFor/id label associations with sr-only class for visual hiding

findings.finding: No .sr-only utility class defined - makes accessible-but-hidden labels impossible
findings.fix: Add standard .sr-only class (position: absolute, clip, overflow: hidden)

findings.finding: Focus trap catches Tab but doesn't handle Escape key to close modal - blocks keyboard-only users
findings.fix: Add Escape key handler with onEscapePress callback

findings.finding: Epic toggle buttons use role=button with title but no aria-label - screen readers can't describe action
findings.fix: Add aria-label={`Toggle ${ep.name} visibility`}

findings.finding: Unicode triangle button lacks aria-label - announces as raw character
findings.fix: Add aria-label='Run options' to button

findings.finding: Loading skeleton lacks aria-busy attribute - screen readers don't announce loading state
findings.fix: Add aria-busy='true' and role='status' to skeleton root

findings.finding: Toggle buttons could benefit from aria-controls attribute linking to controlled section
findings.fix: Add aria-controls={sectionId} and id to controlled panels

security.evidence: Read all server files. Path traversal persists in knowledge and attachment routes - kFile parameter validated for ../ but kType-based path construction could be incorrect. Command injection in terminal launch via string interpolation for 3 OS targets. Missing task ID validation on 5 endpoints. npm audit: 1 high picomatch ReDoS, 5 moderate. Server is localhost-only with origin-based CORS.

findings.finding: Knowledge API constructs path as join(projectPath, kType, kFile) - kFile validated but resolved path not boundary-checked with startsWith()
findings.fix: Validate resolved path stays within .devmanager/ directory using path.resolve + startsWith

findings.finding: Attachment routes use taskId and filename in path without strict boundary validation
findings.fix: Validate both params and ensure resolved path stays within .devmanager/attachments/

findings.finding: Command injection in Windows terminal launch - single-quote escaping of user command is fragile
findings.fix: Use spawn with array args instead of shell string interpolation

findings.finding: Command injection in macOS terminal launch via osascript double-quote interpolation
findings.fix: Use spawn with array args or shell-escape library

findings.finding: PUT and DELETE /api/knowledge have same path construction issue as GET
findings.fix: Apply path boundary validation to all knowledge endpoints

findings.finding: Task ID from URL params not validated as positive integer - used directly in file paths
findings.fix: Add /^\d+$/ validation before using in path construction

findings.finding: High-severity picomatch ReDoS vulnerability plus 5 moderate brace-expansion/minimatch vulns
findings.fix: Run npm audit fix to patch picomatch; remaining 5 require eslint major version bump

performance.evidence: Bundle 119.34KB gzip (marginal increase from 118.91KB). Build 863ms (fast). No code splitting. No obvious N+1 patterns. Single bundle is reasonable for app complexity.

findings.finding: No code splitting - entire app in single 119KB gzip bundle
findings.fix: Lazy load QualityPanel, KnowledgePanel, SkillsConfigPanel

findings.finding: computePhases potentially recomputed on every render
findings.fix: Verify useMemo dependency comparison is stable

devops.evidence: Build passes. 1 lint error, 30 warnings (stable). 353 test failures (up from 320 - worsening). 6 dep vulnerabilities (stable). No CI/CD pipeline.

findings.finding: 353 test failures - suite not green, worsening trend (320 -> 353)
findings.fix: Fix interface mismatches and exclude worktree duplicates

findings.finding: 6 dep vulnerabilities (1 high picomatch ReDoS, 5 moderate brace-expansion)
findings.fix: Run npm audit fix

findings.finding: No CI/CD pipeline - no automated quality gates
findings.fix: Add GitHub Actions workflow for build + lint + test

findings.finding: 1 ESLint error and 30 warnings (stable but not improving)
findings.fix: Fix error and triage warnings
